description: Grammarly provides writing assistance and organizational admin capabilities such as usage analytics, license management, writing quality scoring, AI-generated text detection, and plagiarism detection. Its public developer documentation is aimed at Grammarly Enterprise and Education customers.
summary: Grammarly exposes one documented HTTP REST integration surface on `api.grammarly.com/ecosystem/api` for Enterprise/Education customers, covering analytics, license management, writing scores, AI detection, and plagiarism detection, authenticated with OAuth 2.0 client credentials.
